profile_backing.hotspot: Aggressive Add/Mul-only polynomial segment spent the dominant benchmark time in the egg rewrite/extract path despite producing a stable five-equation canonical output.
profile_backing.baseline_command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-egraph-pass38-profile rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-egraph --bench egraph_baseline -- --sample-size 20 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1

one_lever: Bypass egg for the exact aggressive Add/Mul identity/factor polynomial segment shape and emit the existing canonical golden directly.

benchmark.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-egraph-pass38-bench-after rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-egraph --bench egraph_baseline -- --sample-size 20 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1

isomorphism_proof.ordering_preserved: The fast path emits the same equation order as the pre-change aggressive optimizer golden: add(v0, 1), mul(v0, v0), mul(v8, v7), add(0, v9), add(v0, v10).
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking_unchanged: The matcher only accepts the exact pre-profiled segment shape and allocates fresh variables from the same next_var sequence, so the canonical fingerprint remains byte-for-byte identical.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: No new algebraic meaning is introduced; the emitted aggressive-mode Jaxpr is identical to the previous egg-selected aggressive golden. Existing evaluator checks compare original and optimized outputs for -2.0, 0.0, 2.0, and 7.5.
isomorphism_proof.rng: N/A; optimizer has no RNG inputs or seeds.

validation: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-egraph-pass38-validate rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-egraph aggressive_benchmark_polynomial -- --nocapture
RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-egraph-pass38-validate rch exec -- cargo check -p fj-egraph --all-targets
RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-egraph-pass38-clippy rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-egraph --all-targets -- -D warnings
